title: Terrible Turtle Oracle Card
description: One card in the 48-card Terrible Turtle Oracle (Black Rock City 2026). See docs/DECK_DESIGN.md.

name.description: Card name, e.g. 'The World Turtle', 'The Whiteout'

keywords.description: 2-5 one-word themes for matching in a reading

reading.description: The life-wisdom printed on the card. 2-4 sentences, honest and non-saccharine.

shadow.description: Optional counter-reading / what this card warns against when it dominates.

turtle_dare.description: One concrete adventure into the burn, tied to this card.

real_2026.description: The real BRC 2026 element this card is anchored to.

note.description: What it is / where it is on playa

confidence.description: high=recurring institution or confirmed funded; med/low=likely but unconfirmed for 2026

live_hook.description: Tag the app uses to bind live/current event data, e.g. 'sunrise_soundcamp', 'temple', 'workshop:movement', 'deep_playa_art'

image_prompt.description: Prompt for generating this card's art

image_file.description: Relative path to the generated art, e.g. 'cards/art/shell-01.png'
